title: GitHub Repository
description: GitHub repository data for OSS research and competitive intel.

owner.description: GitHub username or organization name that owns the repository.

homepage_url.description: Homepage URL set on the repository.

language_primary.description: Primary programming language detected by GitHub.

languages.description: Breakdown of programming languages used in the repository.

topics.description: GitHub topic tags applied to the repository.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or license name.

is_fork.description: Whether this repository is a fork of another repository.

is_archived.description: Whether the repository has been archived.

is_template.description: Whether the repository is marked as a template.

stars_count.description: Number of stars the repository has received.

forks_count.description: Number of forks of this repository.

watchers_count.description: Number of users watching the repository.

open_prs_count.description: Number of currently open pull requests.

commits_count.description: Total number of commits on the default branch.

releases_count.description: Total number of GitHub releases published.

latest_release_tag.description: Tag name of the latest release (e.g., 'v1.2.3').

latest_release_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the latest release.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the repository was created.

pushed_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the most recent push.

readme_url.description: URL to the raw README file.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

LanguageStat.description: Language usage statistics for a repository.

bytes.description: Number of bytes of code written in this language.

percentage.description: Percentage of the codebase written in this language.
